text:
In the quiet town of Eldmere, there lived a girl named Lily. She wasn't your ordinary girl; she had the power to become invisible. Each evening after school, she'd vanish into the city, exploring forgotten corners and secret passages.

One crisp autumn evening, while chasing the elusive shape of a fox across cobblestones, Lily slipped on a loose stone. Down she went, crashing through a doorway into a narrow passage that smelled of old books. There she found nothing but dusty tomes—until her ears twitched.

A voice! It whispered along the wall.

"Ho ho," it said. "There's nobody else here."

With a start, Lily realized it was... a giant rat? But it spoke!

"I'm Mr. Midnight. Many a legend guards this place. You didn't hear me?" The rat chuckled.

Lily thought for a moment. "Could you tell me a tale?"

"Golfing in the moonlight?"
